arts.ttl: Monza vs. Lecce: big relegation clash
arts.sum: Monza are the team against which Nikola Krstovic has scored the most goals in Serie A (three); the 2000-born player has scored seven goals in 24 matches in this championship, equalling his haul from last season in the tournament (seven goals in 35 appearances). Both Monza and Lecce have found the net in four of their five Serie A meetings, with only the Brianza side failing to score in their first match at the U-Power Stadium in the top-flight on 28 May 2023 (0-1 away win).

arts.ttl: Official | Former Monaco striker Keita Baldé joins Serie A side Monza
arts.sum: Keita Baldé (29) is on his way back to Serie A after a short spell in Turkey. The former AS Monaco striker has joined Monza for the remainder of the…
